query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'threat_actors' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION LIMIT 30;
